name: The Sketch Artist
overview: A crime thriller seen through the unique angle of a young forensic sketch artist, who works in the investigation unit of the Police Department. As part of a team, she will help try to solve a laundry list of sordid crimes across the city and also tackle cold cases that have been set aside so that justice will be finally served … even if old wounds are opened in the process.

trailers.title: The Sketch Artist 2 | Official Trailer | myLum.tv
